reasoning: All models failed to audit the critical PKGBUILD file due to erroneous binary file detection, making safety determination impossible.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD was skipped by all models due to false binary file detection
No other files (install hooks, source scripts) were reviewed despite being potentially critical
false_negatives: Entire package build process risks were missed due to PKGBUILD skip
Potential malicious commands in build/install functions were not assessed
Source file handling and artifact installation paths were not verified
learnings: Implement robust text file detection: PKGBUILD should never be classified as binary
Add fallback mechanism: When PKGBUILD fails initial scan, attempt hexdump/strings analysis
Prioritize PKGBUILD above all other files in audit workflow
Include file type verification in pre-audit checks to prevent false binary classification
Add warning system for packages where PKGBUILD is the only file
